name: Carrot- Habanero Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 chili pepper - Habanero, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix together briefly until well combined.
3. Ensure the salsa has a coarse texture.
4. If using a food processor, process the chili pepper and garlic first.
5. Add the remaining ingredients and mix for a short time to combine.
6. Do not overprocess the mixture.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
NOTE: For a spicier version, use a whole Habanero pepper. Other less fiery chilies can be substituted.
